title: glaucium corniculatum var. refractum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. refractum, also known as lesser cornflower or small poppy, is a perennial plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) and is native to Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Glaucium corniculatum var. refractum include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and asthma. Glaucium corniculatum var. refractum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through tinctures, teas, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
